Uses of Class
liquibase.changelog.ChangelogRewriter.ChangeLogRewriterResult

  • Packages that use ChangelogRewriter.ChangeLogRewriterResult 
    Package Description
    liquibase.changelog  

    • Uses of ChangelogRewriter.ChangeLogRewriterResult in liquibase.changelog

      Methods in liquibase.changelog that return ChangelogRewriter.ChangeLogRewriterResult 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static ChangelogRewriter.ChangeLogRewriterResult ChangelogRewriter.addChangeLogId(String changeLogFile, String changeLogId, DatabaseChangeLog databaseChangeLog)
      Add the changelog ID from the changelog file and update the XSD version
      static ChangelogRewriter.ChangeLogRewriterResult ChangelogRewriter.removeChangeLogId(String changeLogFile, String changeLogId, DatabaseChangeLog databaseChangeLog)
      Remove the changelog ID from the changelog file
